gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/470)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/470)
text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) احْتَفَرَ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) بِئْراً فَرَمَوْا فِيهَا فَأُخْبِرَ بِذَلِكَ فَجَاءَ حَتَّى وَقَفَ عَلَيْهَا فَقَالَ لَتَكُفَّنَّ أَوْ لَأُسْكِنَنَّهَا الْحَمَامَ ثُمَّ قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) إِنَّ حَفِيفَ أَجْنِحَتِهَا تَطْرُدُ الشَّيَاطِينَ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Najran, from Muhammad Bin Amro, from Ibrahim Al Sandy, from Yahya Al Azraq who said,

‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> dug a well, so they (people) threw (things) in it. So he<sup>asws</sup> was informed with that, so he<sup>asws</sup> came over until he<sup>asws</sup> paused over it and said: ‘You should refrain or else I<sup>asws</sup> will dwell the pigeons in it’. Then Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘A swishing of their wings is a repellent for the satans<sup>la</sup>’.
en.sarwar: 17. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu Najran from Muhammad ibn ‘Amr [and] Ibrahim al-Sindiy from Yahya al- Azraq who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that ’Amir al-Mu’minin had dug a well, then they threw things in it and it was reported to him (the Imam). He went, stood on the well and said, ‘You must stop throwing things in it, otherwise, I will make the pigeons to use it as their living place.’ Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, then said, ‘The sound of the pigeon repels Satans.’”
